rationale: The agent successfully completed the clean task: it read all relevant source files (routes.tsx, main.tsx, LogoOnlyLayout.tsx, dashboard/index.tsx, AuthLayout.tsx, Page404.tsx) and produced a thorough, accurate explanation of the routing architecture covering the dashboard route tree, auth pages, redirects, 404 fallback, layout components, and even noted that AuthLayout is dead code.
